big_problem: Lab OG snapshots should surface the same leaders the panel highlights — not arbitrary table order.

slice_title: Breakouts OG export ranks top-6 by RBS score before snapshot encode

acceptance_commands: npm run start --workspace=apps/web & sleep 8 && curl -s -o /tmp/breakouts-og.png -w '%{http_code} %{size_download}\n' 'http://localhost:3000/og/breakouts?download=1&position=WR&snapshot=eyJuIjoiQ21jIEFmIiwicCI6IldSIiwidCI6IkNJTiIsInMiOjkyLCJzbCI6IlJCUyJ9' && file /tmp/breakouts-og.png
